title: Scott Allie
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Scott}}
[[File:ScottAllie.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Portrait of Scott Allie]]
'''Scott Allie''' has written for [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] comics in the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'', ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series.

==Biography==
Scott Allie is from [[Wikipedia:Ipswich, Massachusetts|Ipswich, Massachusetts]] and now lives in [[Wikipedia:Portland, Oregon|Portland, Oregon]] with his wife Myndi and their phantom cat, Shadow. He writes and edits for Dark Horse Comics and Glimmer Train Press. His non–''Star Wars'' credits include the horror comic ''The Devil's Footprints'', tributes to [[Wikipedia:H.P. Lovecraft|H.P. Lovecraft]], contributions to ''[[Wikipedia:Planet of the Apes|Planet of the Apes]]'', and a series of self-published horror comics called ''Sick Smiles'', from Aiiie! Comics.
